name: Gov Ball 2026
description: Urban festival routing map for Stage Rush

performanceAudio.promptText: Short performance sting for Vanta (Electro Pop) at a festival stage, energetic but clean, no vocals, 2 to 5 seconds.

promptByPose.pose1: Top-down stylized Electro Pop festival artist sprite for Vanta, pose 1: brisk forward walk, readable silhouette, transparent background, clean outline, no text.
promptByPose.pose2: Top-down stylized Electro Pop festival artist sprite for Vanta, pose 2: stride transition with opposite leg/arm, same outfit identity, transparent background, clean outline, no text.

promptByPose.performing: Top-down stylized Electro Pop festival artist sprite for Vanta, performance pose: stage-ready expressive stance, confident and iconic silhouette, transparent background, clean outline, no text.
promptByPose.performanceAudio: Short performance sting for Vanta (Electro Pop) at a festival stage, energetic but clean, no vocals, 2 to 5 seconds.
